message:
test(fuzz): add decode_hello_cbor/decode_ack_cbor canonical-decode fuzz target (resolves dyfmr)

decode_hello_cbor + decode_ack_cbor (session.rs:491-501) wrap
decode_canonical_cbor which runs four rejection gates on bare
canonical CBOR (no schema-hash prefix): PayloadTooLarge,
CborDeserialize, TrailingBytes, NonCanonicalEncoding via
to_canonical_cbor(decoded) byte-equality at session.rs:479-482.

Existing fuzz_session and fuzz_session_transcript test panic-freedom
on parse, but NOT round-trip or rejection gates as discrete MRs.
Distinct from cchj5 (CanonicalSerializer schema-prefixed envelope) —
this is the bare canonical-CBOR path the handshake uses.

Four properties:
- hello round-trip: encode → decode_hello_cbor → re-encode is byte-equal
- ack round-trip: encode → decode_ack_cbor → re-encode is byte-equal
- trailing-bytes rejection: encoded || extra MUST trip a Cbor error
- truncated input rejection: strict prefix MUST trip a Cbor error

Once-gated regression anchors:
- (a) constructed hello round-trips byte-for-byte
- (b) hello + single 0xFF trailing byte → SessionError::Cbor (catches
  TrailingBytes/NonCanonicalEncoding gate drop at session.rs:475-482)
- acceptance: clean bytes still parse (keeps rejection anchor non-vacuous)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -715,5 +715,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_decode_hello_ack_canonical"
+path = "fuzz_targets/decode_hello_ack_canonical.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
